flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Miami University-Oxford rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.4k → $41.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Miami University-Oxford fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
